Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams. ## Skills **Languages, Expert** <p>TypeScript</p> , <p>JavaScript</p> , <p>Python</p> , <p>Go</p> **Frontend, Expert** <p>React</p> , <p>Next.js</p> , <p>HTML/CSS</p> , <p>Tailwind</p> **Backend & Cloud, Advanced** <p>Node.js</p> , <p>PostgreSQL</p> , <p>AWS</p> , <p>Docker</p> ## Experience ### Senior Software Engineer #### Highlights * <p>&lt;p&gt;Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure.&lt;/p&gt;</p> *

<p>Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests</p>

*

<p>Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans</p>
